mapper.insert:
insert into aiw_product_theme_relation (biz_id, product_biz_id, relation_type, relation_code, relation_name, relation_weight, source_code, evidence, created_at, updated_at) values
(#{item.bizId}, #{item.productBizId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.relationCode}, #{item.relationName}, #{item.relationWeight}, #{item.sourceCode}, #{item.evidence}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
